name: reych-landing-page
description: REYCH landing page powered by Google Apps Script

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/client'; const dst='dist'; if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); function copy(s,d){const stat=fs.statSync(s); if(stat.isDirectory()){if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>copy(path.join(s,f),path.join(d,f)));}else fs.copyFileSync(s,d);}; fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>copy(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f))); console.log('Frontend built');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Ready for Netlify deployment'
scripts.dev: echo 'Use Google Apps Script editor at script.google.com for local dev'
scripts.deploy-gas: clasp deploy && echo 'Apps Script deployed. Get deployment ID from clasp deployments'

author: Adrián
